name: Sword of the Just
depiction: Excalibur gleaming with righteous light
effect: Target ally’s melee attacks deal an extra [[1d8]] radiant damage for 1 minute, and on a critical hit this effect stuns the target until the end of their next turn ⚔️

name: Paragon's Grace
depiction: A shining knight bestowing a blessing
effect: Target ally’s movement speed doubles and they gain temporary HP equal to your level for 1 minute 🏇

name: Excalibur’s Blessing
depiction: A shining sword embedded in a stone
effect: Target ally’s weapon attacks deal an additional [[1d8]] radiant damage for the next minute ⚔️

name: Arthur’s Boon
depiction: A regal knight holding Excalibur aloft, light streaming down
effect: Target ally’s weapon attacks deal an extra [[1d6]] radiant damage and they have resistance to fear effects for 1 minute ⚔️

name: King Arthur's Blessing
depiction: A regal knight placing Excalibur into the stone, light radiating
effect: Target ally's weapon attacks score a critical hit on a 19 or 20 for the next minute 👑

name: Lance of Valor
depiction: A shining lance held aloft by a charging knight
effect: Target one ally who hits an enemy this round

name: Oathkeeper's Blessing
depiction: A knight swearing an oath with sword on a stone
effect: The ally gains a +1 bonus to attack rolls, damage rolls, and saving throws for 10 minutes or until they deal damage to a creature that isn’t hostile 🛡️

name: Arthur's Blessing
depiction: A shining knight with a luminous crown
effect: The chosen ally gains advantage on all attack rolls and saving throws until the end of their next turn ⚔️

name: Silver Lance
depiction: A shining lance glowing with mystical light
effect: The next time an ally hits with a melee attack, it deals an additional [[2d6]] radiant damage and knocks the target prone if it fails a Strength save DC 13 ⚡

name: Gallant Surge
depiction: A knight charging forward with lance and shield
effect: The selected ally moves up to their speed instantly and gains temporary HP equal to your level + [[1d8]], lasting 1 minute 🚀

name: Vigilant Charge
depiction: A mounted knight charging forward with lance lowered
effect: The targeted ally gains a bonus to their next melee attack equal to your proficiency bonus and their movement speed increases by 10 feet until the end of their next turn 🐎

name: King Arthur's Guard
depiction: A legendary knight standing with Excalibur raised high
effect: Until the end of your next turn, the chosen ally’s attacks deal an extra [[1d12]] radiant damage and they gain advantage on saving throws against charm and fear effects ✨

name: Arthurian Guard
depiction: A regal knight in shining armor stands before a crowd of commoners
effect: Until the end of your next turn, you and all allies within 30 feet gain +2 AC, and any attack targeting them has disadvantage as you take the blow instead 🏰

name: Bulwark of the Fallen
depiction: An armored knight shielding a wounded comrade from arrows
effect: Until the start of your next turn, choose one ally: damage dealt to them is reduced by [[2d8]] and they regain [[1d6 + your level]] HP 🛡️

name: Steadfast Protector
depiction: A knight standing firm against a charging enemy
effect: Until the start of your next turn, the target ally has advantage on death saving throws and cannot be moved against their will 🚩

name: Gallant Parry
depiction: A knight skillfully deflecting an arrow with a shining blade
effect: When an ally within 30 feet is hit by an attack, you can use your reaction to reduce the damage taken by [[1d10+your spellcasting modifier]] 🛡️

name: King's Vigil
depiction: A regal knight with a glowing crown
effect: You and all allies within 30 feet gain +1 AC and advantage on Wisdom saving throws for 1 minute 👑

name: Loyal Charger
depiction: A knight on a steed rushing forward with banner unfurled
effect: You and one ally within 30 feet each gain +10 feet movement and advantage on opportunity attack rolls until the end of your next turn 🐎

name: Chivalrous Charge
depiction: A knight on horseback charging with lance lowered
effect: You and target ally both gain +10 feet movement and advantage on your next melee attack within 1 minute 🐎

name: Chivalric Grace
depiction: A knight kneeling to offer mercy to a foe's fallen friend
effect: You can remove one condition (such as frightened or stunned) from one ally within 30 feet, cleansing their spirit with the nobility of chivalry ✨

name: Lantern of the Lost
depiction: A knight holding a glowing lantern in a dark alley
effect: You cast this lantern's light on one ally within 30 feet, granting them truesight out to 60 feet and advantage on Stealth checks for 10 minutes 🕯️

name: Shieldbearer’s Oath
depiction: A knight guarding a commoner from a shadowy threat
effect: You grant an ally within 30 feet a shield. Until the start of your next turn, the ally gains +2 AC and any damage they take over [[5 + your spellcasting modifier]] is reflected back to the attacker 🛡️

name: Excalibur's Boon
depiction: A gleaming sword with runes glowing along its blade
effect: You grant an ally within 30 feet advantage on their next attack roll and add [[1d8+2]] radiant damage to the hit ⚔️

name: Guardian's Step
depiction: A knight stepping firmly forward, blocking a path
effect: You grant one ally the ability to move without provoking opportunity attacks for their next turn and gain +2 to AC until then 👣

name: Lantern of Valor
depiction: A glowing lantern held high by a knight
effect: You grant one ally within 30 feet advantage on attack rolls and saving throws until the end of their next turn, and their weapon attacks deal an additional [[1d6]] radiant damage 💡

name: Guardian of the Poor
depiction: A knight kneeling before a group of street children, offering a loaf of bread
effect: You grant one ally within 30 feet the benefits of the *spare the dying* cantrip at will for 1 minute and disadvantage on attack rolls against any ally with less than half max HP ⚔️

name: Loyal Steed
depiction: A noble horse shining under a sunlit sky
effect: You summon a spectral steed that follows an ally, granting them advantage on movement speed checks and saving throws against being restrained or knocked prone for 10 minutes 🐴
